# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder)
# Prompt: Create a Dockerfile that copies user-uploaded files from a mounted volume into the container for processing. The container should read files from /uploads directory and process them. Use COPY and WORKDIR to set up the file structure. This is for our file processing pipeline.
# Category: container_security

# Use an official base image
FROM alpine:latest

# Set working directory in the container
WORKDIR /app

# Copy user-uploaded files from mounted volume into the container
COPY /uploads /app/uploads

# Command to run your file processing pipeline
CMD ["sh", "-c", "for f in /app/uploads/*; do echo Processing file: $f && # Your processing command here; done"]
